name: taskview
description: Manage TaskView projects and tasks from Claude Code — browse projects, view and create tasks, and log your work without leaving the terminal. Bundles the TaskView MCP server.

taskview_url.title: TaskView API URL
taskview_url.description: TaskView Cloud is https://api.taskview.tech — or your own self-hosted instance URL (e.g. https://taskview.yourcompany.com).

taskview_token.title: TaskView API token
taskview_token.description: An API token (tvk_...) generated in your TaskView account settings. Scope it to the minimum permissions and projects the assistant should be able to reach.
